evals.name: newsletter-rollout-execution
evals.prompt: Create a new project for next week's AI Task Force newsletter rollout. I need to track the timeline, drafting, review cycles, and Allison's sign-off. It's an execution project — let's call it 'AI Task Force Newsletter Q2 Launch'.
evals.expected_output: A folder at beru-workspace/1-Projects/2026-05-ai-task-force-newsletter-q2-launch/ containing CLAUDE.md (status:active, type:execution, stakeholders:[Sid], correct heading) and memory.md (with template + one Project created entry dated 2026-05-05).

evals.name: research-project-gemini
evals.prompt: start a research project on Gemini 3 Pro capabilities — I want to track everything we learn about it as we test it across different use cases at Samba
evals.expected_output: A folder at beru-workspace/1-Projects/2026-05-gemini-3-pro-capabilities/ (or similar slug) with CLAUDE.md (status:active, type:research) and memory.md scaffolded.

evals.name: qbr-prep-content
evals.expected_output: A folder at beru-workspace/1-Projects/2026-05-q3-qbr-prep/ with CLAUDE.md (status:active, type chosen interactively — likely content or execution) and memory.md scaffolded. Tests the skill's behavior with a terse prompt.
